title: Requiem ad Vitam
description:
This is a lightweight modpack featuring Requiem and the add-on Ad Vitam aiming to provide the most packed experience possible. 
Quilt 1.19.2
body:
**You may have heard of [Requiem](https://modrinth.com/mod/requiem), but have you heard of [Ad Vitam](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-vitam)?**

Ad Vitam is an add-on that adds several useful features to Requiem. The two most relevant are the new remnant type: the Wraith, and the ability to create a corpse from the ground. 

Alongside these are a few world-gen mods. For the overworld, we have [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) and [Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers) for a fresh exploration experience when you're flying around as an incorporeal being! The Nether and End have been completely overhauled with [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium) and [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape).

And of course, the modpack includes optimization with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) to ensure your game runs smoothly.
